ui.lede: Visual, verified walkthroughs of ownCloud Infinite Scale Web. Every step is a real end-to-end test, captured, not mocked.
ui.sourceNote: Generated from {source} and re-captured on every full CI run.
ui.footerLede: Every walkthrough is generated from a passing end-to-end test and re-captured on each full CI run, so the screenshots can never drift from the real product.

search.title: Searching your files
search.summary: Find files by name or by what is inside them, then narrow the results with filters.

steps.title: Start from the search bar
steps.caption: Wherever you are in ownCloud Web, the search bar sits at the very top. Click it and begin typing what you are looking for.

steps.title: Results appear as you type
steps.caption: Matches surface instantly in a dropdown. Pick one to jump straight to the file, or press <kbd>Enter</kbd> to open the full results page.

steps.title: It searches inside your files too
steps.caption: Results match on the file name and the file contents. Here annual-summary.txt matches because the word report appears inside it, shown highlighted.

steps.title: Narrow by when it changed
steps.caption: Open the Last modified filter to limit results to today, the last 7 or 30 days, this year, or last year.

steps.title: Match the file name only
steps.caption: Switch from Full text search to Title only to match file names alone. Content-only matches like annual-summary.txt drop away, leaving just budget-report.txt.

sharing.title: Sharing a file with a colleague
sharing.summary: Give someone in your organisation access to a file, choose what they can do, and keep track of it.

steps.title: Open the share panel
steps.caption: Hover a file and click the Share icon. The sharing panel opens on the right, ready to add people.

steps.title: Find your colleague
steps.caption: Type a name or email in the Search box. Matching people in your organisation appear, so pick the right one.

steps.title: Choose what they can do
steps.caption: Set the permission: <mark>Can view</mark> lets them view and download, while <mark>Can edit</mark> also lets them upload and change the file.

steps.title: Send the invite
steps.caption: Click Share. Your colleague now appears under Shared with with exactly the access you chose.

steps.title: Keep track of what you shared
steps.caption: Everything you share lives under Shares, Shared with others, where you can adjust the role or revoke access at any time.

spaces.title: Creating a project Space
spaces.summary: Set up a shared Space for a team or project, with its own storage and members, separate from your personal files.

steps.title: Start a new Space
steps.caption: Go to Spaces and click New Space. Give it a clear name, here Project Apollo, then create it.

steps.title: Your Space is ready
steps.caption: The new Space appears in your Spaces overview with its own storage quota, independent of your personal files.

steps.title: Open the members panel
steps.caption: Click Show members on the Space to manage who belongs to it. You start out as the Manager.

steps.title: Invite your team
steps.caption: Search for a colleague, pick a role, and click Add. Here Marie joins Project Apollo with Can view access.

tags.title: Organising files with tags
tags.summary: Label files with keywords so you can group and find them later, across folders and Spaces.

steps.title: Open a file's details
steps.caption: Select a file and open the details panel on the right. Among the file details you will find a Tags field.

steps.title: Add a tag
steps.caption: Type a label, like <mark>quarterly</mark>, and press <kbd>Enter</kbd>. Reuse an existing tag or create a new one on the fly.

steps.title: Tagged and findable
steps.caption: The tag sticks to the file. Later you can pull up everything with that label by searching tag:quarterly.

trash.title: Restoring a deleted file
trash.summary: Deleted something by mistake? Files are not gone immediately, so you can recover them from Deleted files.

steps.title: Find your deleted files
steps.caption: Open Deleted files from the left sidebar. Removed items wait here instead of disappearing for good.

steps.title: Select and restore
steps.caption: Tick the file you want back and click <mark>Restore</mark>.

steps.title: It is back
steps.caption: The file returns to its original location in your Personal space, exactly where it was before.

publiclinks.title: Sharing with a public link
publiclinks.summary: Create a link anyone can open, choose what they can do, protect it with a password, and manage it whenever you like.

steps.title: Pick the file to share
steps.caption: Open Personal and find the file you want to hand out. A public link works for a single file or for a whole folder.

steps.title: Open the Public links section
steps.caption: Hover the file and click the Share icon, then scroll to Public links in the panel and click Add link.

steps.title: Set the link options
steps.caption: Choose the access level, set a password (required here, and one is generated for you), and optionally add an expiry date.

steps.title: Choose what recipients can do
steps.caption: <mark>Can view</mark> lets people view and download. <mark>Can edit</mark> also lets them upload, change and delete, turning the link into a drop-off point.

steps.title: Copy and share the link
steps.caption: Click Copy link. ownCloud confirms it is on your clipboard, ready to paste into an email or chat, and the link now appears under Public links.

steps.title: Manage the link anytime
steps.caption: Open More options to rename the link, change its password or expiry date, or delete it to revoke access right away.
